configurations.name: base-nocache
runtimeArgs:
import http.server,socketserver
class H(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
 def end_headers(self):
  self.send_header('Cache-Control','no-store, max-age=0')
  self.send_header('Pragma','no-cache')
  super().end_headers()
socketserver.ThreadingTCPServer(('',8772),H).serve_forever()

configurations.name: fmfm-b-nocache
runtimeArgs:
import http.server,socketserver,functools
D='C:/Git/FightingDudes/.claude/worktrees/fmfm-b-garrison-buff'
class N(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
 def end_headers(self):
  self.send_header('Cache-Control','no-store, max-age=0')
  self.send_header('Pragma','no-cache')
  super().end_headers()
socketserver.ThreadingTCPServer(('',8773),functools.partial(N,directory=D)).serve_forever()
